h95e67b04g1d2bg4f48g8e17g33092db8db16: Find the druids. Bleed them dry.
h56466c4fgeed1g4fffg9983g9bc37298b3f9: A glorious day. The Absolute will be pleased.
h99cad534gae06g4d9agb942g7efe68d131b7: But there is more to be done. This place is home to druids - root them out, and kill them.
hc6b89060gc061g414dga6e1g7d2acc7472bd: When you are done, we will celebrate our victory at your camp.
ha4211078g8904g4b4bg9ae9g58fdfa872321: Praise the Absolute! She will reward us well for this exquisite carnage.
h6a66a013g8e4eg4c4cgae51g5f5d775a4dc3: The defences were destroyed when we arrived - your doing, I assume?
hc15d71a0ga0d5g4067ga696g27724679cba6: There were few left alive - you began the slaughter without me, I assume?
h970c8cccgfdb1g49d9g894bg5ffac9bf9675: You are almost worthy to live among drow, faerie.
h83260f12g8775g4a18gb80cgba1490b780f9: There was no honour in this.
h0f5970cdg7e1bg44dbg98c5g0c579fc96fc1: This was murder. The only fitting reward for us is the hangman's noose.
h1102773cg5af3g4e40g85c7g811f0d7e0d6a: *You see the slaughter of the tieflings again, but through her eyes. The delight of blood, the symphony of screams. Glorious.*
hf8cac579g678cg4153g9d21g410046b567e8: The Absolute loves you, True Soul. And serving Her, as you have, is the path to true power.
h5dffb570gef71g458bg81eagf4d3276c744a: Glad to have helped - I made sure they were ready to fall.
hf09218aag7c9ag4e21gb724g33684e791faa: The true honour is to serve the Absolute. She loves you fiercely; I see that in the strength She has given you.
h505886fegcfe1g446dg9268g163d2c2bd927: And She has so much more to give.
h7277fc90g7e37g42d3g86c3gb6384979bf3f: *The tadpole thrashes violently in your brain. Your blood hums. You are changing.*
hfb353ee1g9278g4ac3g8a48g7d080db30001: Do not fight it. The Absolute is rewarding you.
hc767368eg4943g44f8g8df5g61e2b1d98ff8: Next time you face Zariel, you can tear off her pretty wings.
haf30a12dgfdf0g406bgaa82g03366ad0b33a: You will never be a slave again, daywalker. And your coven's shadow will cover the world.
h6fe9d747g7dfag494dg9bf7g5fe667e4a3d4: Even the goddess you served will tremble before you.
h5be9e082g076bg4169g8734gff2bd2576446: You will be first among your kind - worthy to stand alongside your queen rather than kneeling before her.
hc5e7827ag28e8g4e9fgbafdgc0d8531e0497: My destiny... It's so much clearer now.
h1cf6b826gd731g442bgaf44g15d719217636: There is a bond between us, True Soul. I can see what you are. What you want.
h727deb17gb1c3g4269g8563g92fd10bd727e: And you can see what I want.
h482dc84eg184cg4970gb351g08fb40471057: *Through her eyes, you see yourself; skin glistening with sweat, hands bound. Ecstasy... or terror. Maybe both.*
hd42d68dcgad21g4255gb051g63777b0f8bcb: *You feel her breath on your neck, her fingers running down your spine, and then... it is over.*
hd01ac919g2da3g498egb0b4ge2abdd864807: I will come to your camp, tonight. We will celebrate this victory. Together.
hacff769eg0cc3g4052ga934g115a5d5e0be8: *A flash of anger pulses across your brain. You feel cold metal at your throat - then you snap back to yourself.*
h8f099b58gc299g48d8g8ac2g2933e55e2a0b: I already know your mind - I will know your body, one way or another.
hd61ef9a6g09b2g4f7eg9714g58b87790eaff: How do you know so much about me?
h6f538618g1e64g4701ga75fg08eb587fe020: You will no longer need to fear the curse... you will control it.
h813ffcbag0cf9g4cd6gbabbg0bb0617f8e37: The Absolute is not like your infernal master, Blade. This power will be yours to wield as you wish.
h3fb5fefcgf55bg4f20g913fg3f57ff3fa16b: Your allegiance is to Her now, not the doomed god you once served.
h23ecac01geaeeg4a78gb6eegde38f3ca0110: Your allegiance is to Her now, not the pathetic being that holds your pact.
he1fb1e19g748fg4ff3ga646gfc4812b8d88a: New power surges inside you - embrace it.
hf9a505f0g5825g448cgb642g8329bc68874a: You've never encountered power like this before - embrace it.
h0a152174g46a7g4febg8c7eg376ae918c79a: It's been a privilege to fight alongside you.
hd54a9324ga035g4cf4g86aag0f2a9ea187ac: You're an abomination, and now I'm finally going to end you.
h87f6b9b4g4b91g4084gb617ga2e5f8c62cf9: Pathetic. Your blood betrays you, iblith, and I will spill every drop.
hd9734d31g35c4g4ed3gb1a1gb56ac963f20c: The Absolute did not bring you here to assist me - She brought you here to die.
h5f1eceeag1435g4241g9d7agadd5a5eb077e: You won't live to collect any reward, but I will collect your head.
h536adcbdgaae4g4791gb6f2gf3955cf72aca: Please, it's no challenge. Just a friendly little murder between chums.
h82d69b38gdd33g4358gb69egc23b5b6c1eaa: You dare to challenge me? We will see who the Absolute truly loves.
heefe2fdbgca2cg4435gbbeagfaa965447984: Are we planning to kill everyone we meet?
hc555584bg9f25g4c39g8a1ag667edab8bdeb: Your words say nothing, woman. Prove your merit with blood!
hfc8cfbafgf9feg4725g9de6g330f25481ff8: We needn't fight every time, you know. There's this wild notion called choosing your battles!
h613aec11g28a0g4326gba3cgcb4331031414: You rejected the Queen of Spiders for this Absolute - I will slay you in Lolth's name.
h2a38d55cgce4fg40e1ga9d6g54e28a4c4cdd: Greater drow than you have challenged me, sister. The Underdark is thick with their blood.
h10c5b057g4d7bg4b18g9f6fg6dc878ca7ea0: Greater drow than you have challenged me, jaluk. The Underdark is thick with their blood.
hf7543a9fg6548g40f4g9dd8g4c7e2eff3e20: You won't even have the dignity of dying in your homeland. Ssussun pholor dos!
hff008d6bg0b66g4ad0gbb1eg9302888a0e0c: Praise the Absolute, sister! She will reward us well for this exquisite carnage.
h4af495ecg9f54g456ag8b6bge51d23c4a1c8: Praise the Absolute! She will reward us well for this exquisite carnage.
hc32dbb7egc7c7g460fgabf9g6548ef9c6105: I expect great things of you - when the battle begins, show me your worth.
h2b0501c8g1920g4a48ga580gfe38d0757179: There are more - hunt them down!
